bead.title: build(feat-031): transaction-row policy delta fixtures
bead.description: Add transaction-row fixture editing and recursive transaction explain support to the policy impact matrix so active-vs-proposed deltas can cover transaction operation rows. This follows axon-ff92fed7, which intentionally limits the matrix delta to read|create|update|patch|delete entity fixture rows and renders a transaction delta unavailable affordance.
bead.acceptance: policy-authoring.spec.ts covers transaction fixture rows in the impact matrix once recursive transaction explain plumbing and a transaction fixture editor are available; transaction rows show active-vs-proposed decision, redaction, denied-field, and missing-index deltas instead of the unavailable affordance.

governing.title: Feature Specification: FEAT-031 - Policy and Intents Admin UI
